ab: Maxal hngkwasan ka hngkawas mu sayang.
Niqan kingal qbsuran mu snaw, hangan na o Yudaw, maxal kingal hngkwasan ka hngkawas na sayang.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Yudaw，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Yudaw, he is 11 years old.

ab: Seupu nami matas kingal tgbilaq ptasan.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: Smkuxul muyas ka dha nami qbsuran mu snaw.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: Smkuxul ku tmapaq qsiya yayung, msangay siida o, mseupu nami musa tmapaq qsiya yayung ka kana ruwan sapah mu.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: Smkuxul ku mklaan bgurah lupung, saw kiya o, mtduwa nami mseupu muyas ni tmapaq qsiya yayung.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
